target.rawSql: SELECT time, text FROM ( SELECT ts AS time, action AS text, lag(action) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev FROM control_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)) s WHERE prev IS DISTINCT FROM text ORDER BY time

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, metric, value FROM sensor_data WHERE metric IN ('ambient','internal') AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

WITH b AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM batches
  ORDER BY (ended_at IS NULL) DESC, started_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), current_batch AS (
  SELECT
    coalesce((SELECT batch_id FROM b), 0) AS batch_id,
    coalesce((SELECT name FROM b), 'Batch #0') AS name,
    (SELECT style FROM b) AS style,
    (SELECT vessel FROM b) AS vessel,
    coalesce((SELECT started_at FROM b), now()) AS started_at,
    (SELECT ended_at FROM b) AS ended_at,
    (SELECT og FROM b) AS og,
    (SELECT target_fg FROM b) AS target_fg,
    (SELECT notes FROM b) AS notes
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Batch #' AS "Field", batch_id::text AS "Value" FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Name', name FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Beer type', coalesce(style,'-') FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Vessel', coalesce(vessel,'-') FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'Started', to_char(started_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'Ended', coalesce(to_char(ended_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),'(active)') FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'Age (days)', round(extract(epoch FROM (coalesce(ended_at,now())-started_at))/86400.0, 1)::text FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 8, 'OG', coalesce(og::text,'-') FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 9, 'Target FG', coalesce(target_fg::text,'-') FROM current_batch
  UNION ALL SELECT 10,'Notes', coalesce(notes,'-') FROM current_batch
) t
ORDER BY ord
SELECT ts AS "time", action AS "state" FROM control_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

WITH latest_sensor AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric) metric, value, ts
  FROM sensor_data
  WHERE metric IN ('ambient', 'internal', 'gravity')
  ORDER BY metric, ts DESC
), rows AS (
  SELECT
    1 AS ord,
    'Internal' AS item,
    coalesce((SELECT to_char(value, 'FM990.00') FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'internal'), '-') AS value,
    '°C' AS unit,
    (SELECT ts FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'internal') AS updated
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    2 AS ord,
    'Gravity' AS item,
    coalesce((SELECT to_char(value, 'FM990.000') FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'gravity'), '-') AS value,
    'SG' AS unit,
    (SELECT ts FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'gravity') AS updated
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    3 AS ord,
    'Ambient' AS item,
    coalesce((SELECT to_char(value, 'FM990.00') FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'ambient'), '-') AS value,
    '°C' AS unit,
    (SELECT ts FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'ambient') AS updated
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    4 AS ord,
    'Control' AS item,
    coalesce((SELECT action FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), '-') AS value,
    'N/A' AS unit,
    (SELECT ts FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) AS updated
)
SELECT
  item AS "Item",
  value AS "Value",
  unit AS "Unit",
  coalesce(to_char(updated, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '-') AS "Updated"
FROM rows
ORDER BY ord
SELECT ts AS time, value AS "gravity" FROM sensor_data WHERE metric='gravity' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

WITH expected(metric, label, ord) AS (
  VALUES
    ('ambient', 'Ambient', 1),
    ('internal', 'Internal', 2),
    ('gravity', 'Gravity', 3)
), latest_sensor AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric) metric, value, ts
  FROM sensor_data
  WHERE metric IN ('ambient', 'internal', 'gravity')
  ORDER BY metric, ts DESC
), freshness AS (
  SELECT
    e.ord,
    e.metric,
    e.label,
    coalesce(extract(epoch FROM now() - l.ts), 1000000000)::double precision AS age_s,
    l.value,
    l.ts
  FROM expected e
  LEFT JOIN latest_sensor l USING (metric)
), sensor_summary AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE age_s > 180) > 0 THEN 'stale' ELSE 'OK' END AS status,
    CASE
      WHEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE age_s > 180) > 0 THEN
        'stale: ' || string_agg(label, ', ' ORDER BY ord) FILTER (WHERE age_s > 180)
      ELSE 'all fresh'
    END AS remark
  FROM freshness
), control_freshness AS (
  SELECT
    coalesce(extract(epoch FROM now() - (
      SELECT ts FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
    )), 1000000000)::double precision AS age_s,
    (SELECT action FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) AS action,
    (SELECT ts FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) AS ts
), gravity_last_two AS (
  SELECT
    row_number() OVER (ORDER BY ts DESC) AS rn,
    ts,
    value
  FROM sensor_data
  WHERE metric = 'gravity'
  ORDER BY ts DESC
  LIMIT 2
), gravity_pair AS (
  SELECT
    max(value) FILTER (WHERE rn = 1) AS current_sg,
    max(value) FILTER (WHERE rn = 2) AS previous_sg,
    max(ts) FILTER (WHERE rn = 1) AS current_ts,
    max(ts) FILTER (WHERE rn = 2) AS previous_ts
  FROM gravity_last_two
), control_run AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT action FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) AS action,
    (SELECT ts FROM control_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_ts
), control_calc AS (
  SELECT
    action,
    latest_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN action IN ('HEAT', 'COOL')
       AND latest_ts > now() - interval '3 minutes'
       AND NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM control_events
         WHERE action = 'IDLE'
           AND ts > now() - interval '2 hours'
           AND ts <= latest_ts
       )
      THEN extract(epoch FROM now() - coalesce(
        (SELECT min(ts)
         FROM control_events
         WHERE action IN ('HEAT', 'COOL')
           AND ts > now() - interval '3 hours'),
        latest_ts
      ))
      ELSE 0.0
    END::double precision AS active_run_s
  FROM control_run
), rows AS (
  SELECT
    1 AS ord,
    'Sensors' AS alert,
    status,
    remark
  FROM sensor_summary

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    2 AS ord,
    'Control' AS alert,
    CASE WHEN age_s > 180 THEN 'stale' ELSE 'OK' END AS status,
    coalesce('latest=' || action || ', ', '') || 'age=' || round(age_s)::text || 's' AS remark
  FROM control_freshness

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    3 AS ord,
    'Temperature safety' AS alert,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM latest_sensor
        WHERE metric = 'internal'
          AND ts > now() - interval '3 minutes'
          AND (value < 5.0 OR value > 30.0)
      ) THEN 'warning'
      ELSE 'OK'
    END AS status,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM latest_sensor
        WHERE metric = 'internal'
          AND ts > now() - interval '3 minutes'
          AND (value < 5.0 OR value > 30.0)
      ) THEN 'dangerous temperature'
      ELSE coalesce(
        (SELECT 'internal=' || to_char(value, 'FM990.00') || ' °C' FROM latest_sensor WHERE metric = 'internal'),
        'no internal reading'
      )
    END AS remark

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    4 AS ord,
    'SG jump' AS alert,
    CASE
      WHEN current_ts > now() - interval '3 minutes'
       AND previous_ts > now() - interval '1 hour'
       AND abs(current_sg - previous_sg) > 0.005
      THEN 'warning'
      ELSE 'OK'
    END AS status,
    CASE
      WHEN current_ts > now() - interval '3 minutes'
       AND previous_ts > now() - interval '1 hour'
       AND abs(current_sg - previous_sg) > 0.005
      THEN 'abnormal SG jump: '
           || to_char(previous_sg, 'FM990.000')
           || ' -> '
           || to_char(current_sg, 'FM990.000')
      WHEN previous_sg IS NULL OR current_sg IS NULL THEN 'need two gravity readings'
      ELSE 'Δ=' || to_char(abs(current_sg - previous_sg), 'FM990.000')
    END AS remark
  FROM gravity_pair

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    5 AS ord,
    'Effectiveness' AS alert,
    CASE
      WHEN active_run_s > 7200 AND action IN ('HEAT', 'COOL') THEN 'warning'
      ELSE 'OK'
    END AS status,
    CASE
      WHEN active_run_s > 7200 AND action = 'HEAT' THEN 'heating ineffective'
      WHEN active_run_s > 7200 AND action = 'COOL' THEN 'cooling ineffective'
      WHEN action IN ('HEAT', 'COOL') THEN 'active=' || round(active_run_s / 60.0)::text || ' min'
      ELSE coalesce('action=' || action, 'no control event')
    END AS remark
  FROM control_calc
)
SELECT alert AS "Alert", status AS "Status", remark AS "Remark"
FROM rows
ORDER BY ord
